title: Ginger Ray Wedding Evening Invitations Scratch to Reveal The Date 10 Pack, Plastic
features: Reveal the date with Kraft Wedding Evening Invitations
description: Product Description Invite your friends and family to your Wedding Reception in a unique way with these gorgeous Scratch to Reveal Wedding Reception Invitations. The gorgeous vintage kraft designed invites come complete with gold scratch stickers!Each invite has blank space for you to personalise with key information such as: names location and RSVP. Use the blank circles to fill in your wedding date and simply stick the gorgeous gold scratch stickers over the top! Your loved ones will have endless fun scratching the gold stickers to reveal the date of your big day! Each pack contains 10 invitations 10 envelopes and 30 scratch stickers. Invites measure: 10cm (W) x 15cm (H). Safety Warning No Warning
